appearance: His appearance is a secret kept by the Superstition Mountains. Those who have seen him in his staked state describe a figure of ancient power, frozen in a moment of betrayal. His presence still leaks from the cave, felt as whispers on the wind.
biography: Prince Elijah Crenshaw ruled Phoenix until 1973. His reign was characterized by the traditional authority of a Brujah elder. He was betrayed by his childe, Solomon Reaves, who hired an Assamite assassin to remove him. The assassin chose to stake Elijah and hide his body in a remote cave in the Superstition Mountains. He remains there to this night, a buried secret that many wish to keep hidden. His whispers are said to haunt the dreams of those who were present at his fall.
notes: Former Prince of Phoenix. Brujah. Sire of Solomon Reaves. Staked and hidden since 1973. Known only to Kerry the Gangrel and a few others. His potential awakening is a major plot hook.
